error.title: Something broke
error.message: An unexpected error interrupted the journey. Reload the page to rebuild the world.

shell.loadErrorRetry: Reload the page to rebuild the world.

zoneTransition.transitionToMeadowDetail: The eyelids open on the globe. The meadow prepares beyond the threshold.
zoneTransition.transitionToGalleryDetail: The light closes again and the pavilion returns to breathe around the works.

offeringModal.openLinkNewTab: Open link in a new tab

ritualPrompt.ritualHint: Pause for a moment, listen to the place, then choose if you really want to leave a cavapendolata here.

depositModal.title: Leave a cavapendolata here
depositModal.subtitle: The trace remains in this place: it never leaves the scene you are crossing.
depositModal.wizardSubtitle: A shape, a sound, a text: something this place can retain.

intro.bodyDesktop: WASD moves the body and the mouse follows your gaze. As soon as you feel the rhythm of the room, let your eye find the OUTDOOR arch on the opposite wall.
intro.bodyMobile: Horizontally the outside reads better. The left pad moves the body, the right pad curves your gaze: stay soft in the center, push to the edge when you want to turn more.

find-outdoor.bodyDesktop: The interior stays warm and gathered. On the opposite wall the OUTDOOR arch opens by itself when you get close enough.
find-outdoor.bodyMobile: The interior stays warm and gathered. On the opposite wall the OUTDOOR arch opens by itself when you get close enough.

arrive-globe.bodyDesktop: Outside there's no task: there's a first calm space that opens in three directions. Look at the masses first, then choose which call to follow.
arrive-globe.bodyMobile: Outside there's no task: there's a first calm space that opens in three directions. Look at the masses first, then choose which call to follow.

meet-creatures.bodyDesktop: The creatures don't give objectives. They stay, they return, they divert their gaze: when a movement keeps pointing at the same spot, usually the place wants to be heard.
meet-creatures.bodyMobile: The creatures don't give objectives. They stay, they return, they divert their gaze: when a movement keeps pointing at the same spot, usually the place wants to be heard.

find-deposit.bodyDesktop: Suspended rings, vertical glows and creatures that return indicate a ritual place. It's not an obligation: if the place holds, you can choose to leave something.
find-deposit.bodyMobile: Suspended rings, vertical glows and creatures that return indicate a ritual place. It's not an obligation: if the place holds, you can choose to leave something.
find-deposit.hint3Desktop: Leave only if it makes sense
find-deposit.hint3Mobile: Leave only if it makes sense

deposit-ready.bodyDesktop: When you're in the right place, the ritual pause opens without asking for technical gestures. From there you can choose whether to really leave a cavapendolata.
deposit-ready.bodyMobile: When you're in the right place, open the ritual pause and decide calmly whether to really leave a cavapendolata.

preload.title: Loading gallery
preload.description: Preparing the meadow for exploration. Please wait.

mobileOrientation.description: For the best experience, rotate your device to landscape mode.
mobileOrientation.title: Landscape recommended

contatti.title: Contact
contatti.subtitle: Have something to say? Write to us.
contatti.successMessage: Your voice has been heard. We will respond if necessary.
contatti.errorFillFields: Please fill in all required fields.
contatti.errorSendFailed: Unable to send message. Please try again later.

index.subtitle: An explorable threshold
index.descriptionFallback: A room that opens in the meadow, an archive that breathes, a threshold where the cavapendoli show themselves only briefly.
index.mysticalOpening1: The Cavapendoli descend in a spiral, almost swift.
index.mysticalOpening2: They were once everywhere, in the warehouses of the intangible world.
index.mysticalOpening3: Slowly, over time, they took shape.
index.mysticalOpening4: First images, then paintings, then words.
index.mysticalOpening5: But they didn't like to be fixed in place.
index.mysticalOpening6: As time passed, they accepted being exposed to the gaze of strangers.
index.mysticalOpening7: Now they hesitate, perhaps they don't want to be stopped on paper.
index.mysticalOpening8: They slip away, because they live in freedom.
index.mysticalOpening9: They are benign, hilarious, slippery and witty.
index.mysticalOpening10: They come and go, flutter about, land and leave.
index.mysticalOpening11: Who knows what they do when they're not showing themselves.
index.mysticalOpening12: I invite them with humility to enter the barrel of the pen...

cheCose.title: What is it
cheCose.p1: A place where you can leave something.
cheCose.p2: An image, a sound, a text, a fragment.
cheCose.p3: The question: what does Cavapendoli mean to you?
cheCose.p4: There are no right answers. Only traces.

regole.title: Rules
regole.rule1: Leave only what belongs to you or what you have the right to share.
regole.rule2: No hate, harassment, or explicit violent content.
regole.rule4: It is not a social space: there is no judgment here.
regole.rule5: Cavapendolate enter after a brief wait.
regole.rule6: We reserve the right not to publish what does not belong here.

offri.title: Offer
offri.subtitle: Leave something for the cavapendoli.
offri.submittedLine1: Your cavapendolata is waiting to enter.
offri.submittedLine2: It will be visible in the Archive after passing through the Antechamber.

grazie.title: Thank you
grazie.line1: Your cavapendolata is making its way.
grazie.line2: It will cross the Antechamber before entering the Archive.

rimozione.title: Removal
rimozione.line1: If you left something and want it removed,

wizard.successMessage: Your cavapendolata is waiting to enter.
wizard.step2HintNoExplain: It doesn't need to explain everything.
wizard.step4Prompt: How do you want to appear?
wizard.step4NamePlaceholder: what you want to be called
wizard.consentRights: This content is mine, or I can share it.
wizard.consentArchive: It's fine if it enters the Archive, after the Antechamber.
wizard.consentReshare: If necessary, it can be reshared in the project channels.
wizard.errorMissingMediaType: Choose what to leave before sending.
wizard.errorRateLimited: You have submitted many offerings. Try again in a few minutes.
